title: Mapping the Flow
content: You spread the Syndicate Logistics Map across your desk. By marking the drop-off points, you see a clear pattern: all the cash flows toward Atlas Foundation shell companies.||It's not just random crime; it's a massive, synchronized money-laundering machine. You've found the physical proof of where the money goes after it leaves the streets.||📝 FILES UPDATED: Syndicate Money Trail confirmed.
